## Your Cost

| Drug Tier | In-Network | Out-of-Network |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Tier 1 — Preferred Generic drugs | $25 copay | Not covered |
| Tier 1 — Preferred Generic drugs | $50 copay | Not covered |
| Tier 4 — Non-Preferred drugs | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $500 maximum per drug In-Network Specialty Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Specialty Pharmacy |
| Tier 4 — Non-Preferred drugs | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $250 maximum per drug In-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy |
| Tier 4 — Non-Preferred drugs | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $250 maximum per drug In-Network Retail or Mail-Order Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Retail or Mail-Order Pharmacy |
source: Essentials Formulary Drug List (E4) | Pages 121, 122, 123, 124 || Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan | Pages 13, 18
